missionSettings.description:
In this intense hybrid of Escalation and mission-based scenarios, players are thrust into the midst of a full-scale surprise attack by an overwhelming BDF force. With a massive production base and strategic advantages, including an aircraft carrier, a weaponized oil rig, and a sophisticated air defence network, the BDF has a significant advantage.

This mission is designed for **high difficulty**, especially when played solo. Success relies on effective teamwork; players must coordinate with allies to identify and exploit the BDF's vulnerabilities.

Throughout the mission, dynamic events and strategic objectives will emerge—such as taking out high value targets, assisting ground forces, or reacting to BDF movements — completing these secondary objectives can can provide unique bonuses and significantly shift the balance of power in your favour.

Prepare for a relentless battle where teamwork and strategy are your best weapons in turning the tide against the BDF.

Data.StringValue:
Welcome to Total Escalation! The BDF has you outnumbered and outgunned. Resist the initial invasion but expect them to push past your defences at first. This is meant to be a challenge! 

Good Luck!                       By: RNG
[PALA Command] The BDF has pushed past our initial defences and Dustbowl Airstrip has been destroyed.
Fallback to the Sandrift Airbase and regroup!
[PALA Command] Scramble!! We've detected a massive movement
of BDF land and air assets towards our borders!
Get to your aircraft, this looks like a fullscale invasion!
[PALA Command] There is a BDF Admiral that double crossed some mercenaries.
He's located on the aircraft carrier in Boscali Bay.
If you take him out, they've agreed to fight on our side!
[PALA Command] The carrier has been neutralized and the admiral is KIA.
The mercenaries are ready to hold up their end of the bargain,
they are entering the combat area now.
[PALA Command] Great work pilots! The BDF's primary air defence site has been neutralized.
[PALA Command] Pilots! We've identified a BDF anti-ship missile site.
If you take it out, we can send our corvettes into the combat area and utilize our naval base.
[PALA Command] Great work! The anti-ship missile launchers are down.
Our naval assets are now entering the area. We are activating the naval base.
[PALA Command] We've identified the FOB that the BDF used to support their ground forces, destroy it!
[PALA Command] Nice work, the BDF's FOB has been neutralized.
Now that they won't be able to launch any more ground assaults from that location
we are able to deploy more of our ground forces in reserve.
[PALA Command] Nice work, the BDF's units at the HWY base are out of action.
We're activating our ground forces in reserve now, escort them to retake the highway strip.
[PALA Command] The BDF has dispatched their elite tank battalion and it's headed to the front.
The elite units can do significant damage to our ground forces, you need to destroy them!
[PALA Command] Good work! The BDF's elite tank battalion has been destroyed.
[PALA Command] Good work, the industrial site is out of action.
[PALA Command] You've inflicted significant losses on the BDF and their forces are losing the will to fight.
The BDF's commander of the city's garrison has decided to join our cause, Port Maris is under our control!
[PALA Command] Now that the BDF's primary air defence site is down.
We can send in some bombers from their north flank.
[PALA Command] The BDF's forward airstrip is out of action, good work pilots!
[PALA Command] More friendly mercenaries are entering the AO from the south.
[PALA Command] !!!! Alert !!!! There are multiple contacts approaching our territory from the south.
[PALA Command] We've succesfully resisted the BDF's incursion.
Regroup and rearm while we plan the next steps.
[PALA Command] !!! Alert !!! There are radar contacts south of the mountain base!
[PALA Command] !!!! Alert !!!! There are BDF ships approaching the island base!
[PALA Command] We've detected a massive movement of the BDF's ground forces.
It looks like they are throwing everything they have left at us from their north base.
Do not let that convoy reach our territory.
[PALA Command] Great work pilots! The BDF's ground forces have rendered ineffective.
They have no significant reserves left to throw at us.
[PALA Command] We need to eliminate the BDF's Northern Base, their last stronghold.
If you destroy their coastal radar station our naval forces can flank them undetected.
Then our ground forces will be able to assist you.
[PALA Command] Good work! The coastal radar stations have been neutralized.
Our landing forces can now approach from the north.
[PALA Command] Great work pilots! Now, it's time to cut the head off of the snake.
We've located a bunker where the surviving BDF generals are located, destroy it!
[PALA Command] The BDF command has been eliminated, great work pilots! Mission Accomplished.
This scenario can be downloaded from the Steam Workshop under Total Escalation. Please rate and leave feedback!
The BDF's Air Defence Command (ADC) site is where their eastern Stratolance battery is located.
Destroying it will make incursions into their airspace significantly easier.
[PALA Command] We've suffered severe initial losses and don't have many units to spare.
If you can take out the BDF's forces at the highway base, we can send what few reserve ground forces we have to retake it.
[PALA Command] BDF forces are landing troops in Agrapol.
You must stop them from pushing past the beachhead. Defend the capital at all costs!
[PALA Command] Good work, SBGA is clear of BDF forces, we are sending a convoy to capture the base.
[RNG] Huh.... You actually managed to kill the Shards before they made it to land...
I suppose I can't spawn the landing troops now can I?.... :(
[PALA Command] BDF units are setting up a defensive perimeter around Agrapol.
You must liberate the city and destroy the occupying force!
[PALA Command] Great work, Agrapol is free! Our citizens will thank you.
[PALA Command] There is a BDF industrial site that is producing WMDs and other weapons of war.
Destroying it will greatly help our war effort!
[PALA Command] We've lost most of our airbases, fall back to Vigil Cay.
[PALA Command] BDF troops are landing on our Northeast coast!
[RNG] Ughhhhh.... another landing foiled... no fun... :(
[PALA Command] We've lost too many assets, we must surrender.
[PALA Command] We’ve intercepted communications about a BDF carrier in distress!
Apparently it has lost power and is beached. BDF crews are attempting to fix it as we speak.
If you take them out we can ensure the Annex is not made operational.
[PALA Command] The BDF recovery crews have reactivated the Annex.
Now you need to take it out!
[PALA Command] Excellent! The BDF's recovery crews are down.
We're sending in our engineers to see if we can use the Annex ourselves!
[PALA Command] The BDF's beached Annex has been destroyed.
We can't capture it now, but at least it won't be useful to the BDF.
(It will be much easier to attack the base if this objective is completed!!!)
[PALA Command] We've intercepted communications that the BDF is readying their missile sites.
[PALA Command] WARNING! Many of our strategic assets and factories have been destroyed.
If Vigil Cay falls the war is over.
